reviews.review_description: I would like to make a request to the developers of this great game—and I dare say I speak on behalf of the entire community. Please add the option of a defibrillator that allows you to revive your teammate at least once per section. It is frustrating to join a match with two teammates only to be unable to enjoy the rest of the game because you were killed. This would be a fantastic addition to the cooperative experience, and it would be great to be able to keep playing alongside your teammates. We are asking for just one chance.

Game crashes for no reason even in pve mode. Lose everything because no reconnect is allowed. I'm done with this pos game. I've deleted and reinstalled the game multiple times with no help to the problem. The only game I lose connection with while playing. This is BS. Lose gear I can't buy, lose big bag, everything. Crash again, why not over and over. F your game

This is now my favorite game with PvE finally added i can finally enjoy the game when I have some free time being a parent and job was hard to play PvP plus all the kids will have the top gear and ammo was difficult to try to play now that PvE i can play and still have fun while having a challenge the Battle Royale isn't popping like it was but it was still fun to play from time to time. Other then that, this game is better then ghost of tabor by far the ai is smart and difficult gives a challenge on casual mode playing solo but standard with buddy's is by far hard and challenging for sure gets the heart pumping one of my favorite things im so happy PvE is finally in this game. I've been playing everyday once the family is asleep and I am off work. Highly recommend this game

It's a good game highly realistic 👌 just add spectator when you die so you can watch your teammates but make sure you can't see the enemies when your spectating and ADD a DEFIBRILLATOR PLEASE IT WOULD MAKE IT SO MUCH BETTER ALSO ADD PETS please and thank you it would be so cute petting your pet after every fight and make sure he goes onto the battlefield and if you die he teleports to home base every single time PLEASE ADD THIS PLEASE

reviews.review_title: So much better than Ghosts of Tabor
reviews.review_description: This new wipe for exfilzone has taken the game a leap forward, it no longer feels like a beta and more like an actual complete game now. A decent variety of armor, an insane variety of guns, every kit I find feels unique its awesome. Ghosts of tabor doesn’t have nearly as much polish as this game does, the controls are janky, barely any variety in armor or guns, terrible performance, poor balance, exfilzone is just the clear winner ✌️🥺

reviews.review_title: Tabor walked so ExfilZone could run.
reviews.review_description:
ExfilZone wouldn't exist without Tabor, but that's no excuse to say tabor is better because it really is not.
I'mma cover some main arguments between the games here so this is more of a comparison than a review.
1. "ExfilZone is unrealistic"
A lot of tabor simps like to say that ExfilZone is bad because it isn't realistic like tabor apparently is. This is mixed between graphics and TTK. TTK wise, tabor players get angry that fights actually last in ExfilZone, although it may not be realistic, it is more built for the user, more playable and more balanced. In tabor, people wearing an Altyn can be one shot to the head by .22 AP. This is incredibly unrealistic and unfair. So just imagine how things happen when people use AP in the best guns in the game. Also, AP is far too easy to get, you can find any random box in a crate which would make upwards of 200 rounds. In ExfilZone, you have to level up your traders to get better ammo and the best ammo is trade only or you have to get lucky to find it in a raid.
Graphics wise, they don't matter. Also, Tabor aims for a realistic and grimey look but it ends up being bad UV mapping, blurry, too dark and having terrible quality lighting, things dont blend well, theres no live lighting and some areas are pitch black while some make you the whitest you can be. Exfilzone has some lighting bugs but it is stylized, easier to look at and more immersive.
2. "ExfilZone copied tabor"
This is like saying terraria copied minecraft because they're both survival games. If anything Tabor constantly copies exfilzone. All of the new updates recently are bad, paid or copied from exfilzone. From the health system to newer bosses to recent planned features. 
3. "ExfilZone is P2W"
This might be the strongest argument. But..........
Exfilzone does have many DLCs which give an advantege but so does Tabor, both having a level 2 trader upgrade with a lot of gear that comes with it. I would go as far as to say that tabor gives more. I ran out of space t

As an early follower of Showdown and someone who spent a ridiculous amount of time in the Battle Royale(loving every piece of it, even with the lag and other technical issues at the time) 

I have to ask, WHY did they introduce a game mode nobody asked for and abandon the one everyone was so excited about?

I am calling for a boycott of the game until they bring back the BR mode. I am changing my 5-star review to a 1-star review, and I hope others will do the same so the developers might actually hear us.

#BringBattleRoyaleBack

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing this so honestly. We completely understand why you feel this way, and we truly appreciate the passion and support you’ve shown for Showdown and BR from the start. We want to reassure you that BR has not been abandoned, and the team has not given up on it. We’re continuing to work on the game, and we’ll share more when we’re ready. Thank you again for sticking with us and making your voice heard.

reviews.review_description:
This game is extremely fun, the guns are great, rarity system for items guns and bullets are top notch, only issue is doing raids with a random team mate in pvp, when you do that, if you’re taking an extremely good kit with you, guaranteed that “ teammate” will shoot you themselves and take your loot to the closest extraction zone, so I’m just asking for the devs to make a change, tweak duo- trio raids so that you can’t kill your own team mate for their loot
 but other people in the raid not in your group can, because it’s annoying going in a raid with a team mate just for them to turn on you for your hard earned loot ( sorry for the yapping)

Welcome to the world of rats and campers!!!! Game is ok game play is not if you can even wait 10min for a game to even load items just fall through the map, you get shot through walls and did I mention rats and campers waiting for you to exvil grrr are you a solo player good news here comes a three stack that's all 20 lvls higher than you hahaha oh wait there's more are you finally making some progress in game don't worry it will be wiped in a few weeks and you get to start from scratch how fun not to mention the dlcs costs as much as the game not alot to be positive over as of April 25 2026

I do enjoy this game but because of how many bugs it has it makes the game almost unplayable, i reached out to caveman studios to report these issues such as: 

being kicked out of a game mid raid and when i reopen the game its spawns me in like i was killed and i lose all of my stuff for no reason

When i leave my boundry and come back itll glitch out to where im still in the game but i can only hear the game enviorment but i cant see anything

Or guns dissapearing into the floors or submitting items that are for missions and the game just eats it and you have to do the whole mission all over again

Like i said ive tried to contact caveman studios but they dont respond and when they do very little is dont to resolve these issues such a shame because this really is a good game but its severely flawed by its bugs

developer_response.body: Hey, sorry to hear this has been your experience. Crashes and lost gear are genuinely frustrating and we take that seriously. We’re actively monitoring crash reports and working on fixes. There is also a rejoin feature available after a crash that should help you get back into your raid. Please make sure your game is fully updated and feel free to reach out to our support team on Discord if you need any help.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.review_title: Bought for BR, game turned into exfil :(
reviews.review_description: Remembering the good old days playing battle royale the 1 thing the game was purchased for when it came out. Then the developers decided to just be exfil... what a waste... sits unused in my library. Ruined a good thing, heres hoping a new better BR shows up soon by a developer who doesnt just abandon the mode you bought the game for....

developer_response.body: We hear you, and we know how much the original BR meant to players like you. BR has not been abandoned. We’re planning to bring it back as free to play with new content, and we want to do it right. We appreciate your patience and hope you’ll give it another shot when it returns.​​​​​​​​​​​​​ Pls stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: First of all the devs of this game and all the discord mods are pedifiles dont let ur kids play this or join the discord they will be groomed. Now if ur a adault dont buy this game only thing the devs care about is you buying the dlcs which wont help you since like day 3 people figured out how to dup the best ammo and thats all they run i ran I to somone with 15 drums of 993 thats ammo that u have to trade for. These pedifiles need to sell there gane to a company who can tackle all these cheaters cuz the pedifile devs just dont care anymore. So with the dupers u have people streaming running cheats off there pc and people who have figured out how to run invisible. This is the worst wipe ever cuz the pedifile devs added pve which means the pedifiles have less time to fix issues with pvp. Save ur money unless u want to play pve

developer_response.body:
We want to be very clear: the accusations made in this review are completely false and defamatory. Our development team and community moderators are committed to creating a safe and welcoming environment for all players, and we take any suggestion to the contrary extremely seriously.

On the cheating and duplication concerns, these are issues we have been actively addressing. Multiple duplication exploits have been patched, BattlEye anti-cheat is in place, and we use telemetry monitoring to detect and take action against players who cheat or exploit, including bans and progression rollbacks. We are also actively monitoring known cheat sources online and take targeted action against them.

reviews.review_title: A bug that kills the fun
reviews.review_description:
I really wanna give the PVE a higher score but there's one critical bug that I've encountered multiples times during a game run where the game turns complitely black and no visual is shown anymore but I can still hear everything happening around me but I'm unable to move nor see anything, so im just being stuck in a game that i can't move, can't see but can only hear and thus I'm forced to manually quit the game and freaking lose everything that i have in that run even im not being killed...

I have no issue with my quest, as my quest is working just fine, there's no lag or anything and even after the game turns black without any visual, my quest is still working just fine and interatable....

I have no idea why is this bug happening and it's runing this game as now aside of worrying losing things after being killed by bots, I need to worry about this uncertainty black screen that can "kill" u at any random given moments...

Potentially the best vr battle royale completely sabotaged by it’s developers.  From the GLITCHED HELLSCAPE (unable to reload weapons randomly, weapons falling through floors, certain attachments not working properly like 4x sights that zoom in sideways or don’t zoom at all, characters randomly becoming immobile, clips randomly disappearing from guns in the middle of fire fights, airstrikes not deploying or completely disappearing from inventory and the list actually goes on), to the cheating, to the broken map placements in the middle of the sea, to having to re-equip weapon attachments and skins, and oh man last but most certainly not least the ridiculous amount of game crashes in br (5 back to back at lobby launch or mid game is what promoted me to finally write this review) it is INSANE that we paid money for this.  The neglect of the battle royale version of a paid game is sincerely mind blowing and at this point unhealthy to attempt playing. This is NOT ok

developer_response.body: We hear you, and we know how frustrating it is to run into that many issues in a mode you care about. The bugs you've listed, especially the crashes, are not acceptable and we take them seriously. BR has not been abandoned. In fact, we're planning to update it as free to play with new content, and we want to make sure it's in a state worthy of your support. We understand that actions speak louder than words at this point, but feedback like this helps us understand the scope of what needs to be fixed. Thank you for still caring enough to write this out.

reviews.review_description: Game feels alright besides the random freezing stuttering and flying into the ceiling, the scavs needs help badly, you can put a full mag of rounds into them and they shoot you twice and you die. I played two raids and same outcome both times reloading and continuing to fire on one single scav is insane! It’s not challenging in a fun way it’s challenging in a I never want to play this again way

Was always a fan of the game. But after the new addition of PVE mode where my less skilled brother and I can just relax and go raid, it truly has become my favorite VR game. Organizing my bunker without fear of a wipe is a great feeling. This games graphics looks amazing compared to other games I’ve played and mechanics are smooth enough to get immersed in. Would 100% recommend this game to someone with a headset. The DLC is cool too, was so conditioned on paying 60+ for new games on PC and Xbox, it’s a relief to have such low price tags on games like this. I look forward to what else the Devs have in store for the game

Devs don’t care about the game, they care about your money. 
They use ai slop to update the game.
They completely abandoned the battle royale it’s impossible to find a game.
They don’t communicate like they promised. They ban you from their discord foropinions related to the game.
Their discord mods are the most Dorito dusty fingered people on earth. Game would need a completely new team to be worth buying

Started a raid and my game immediately crashed. When I relaunched ExfilZone, it gave me the option to reconnect. I tried reconnecting and got a black screen before the game crashed again. After launching the game a second time and reconnecting, I finally got back into the raid, but all of my gear was gone.

I am a new player to this game, and my current inventory was pretty good, I had the standard RARE AR with 5.56 45 ammo, a legendary handstock, and some good stuff in my backpack. I like to play on bot modes a lot because I dont have a lot of vr friends so I stick solo, and when I found that this game supports a PVE mode, that I didn't hesitate to buy it. I stepped into a new map for me, Suburbs, and encountered a bot that had armor on, so my instinct is to headshot the guy as I have done on the first map every time, instant kill. Nope, this guy makes me mag dump twice, just for him to almost kill me in two shots, seems unfair as hell. I tried leaving the game so maybe I can bring all my stuff I had back to the base and stay safe, but nope, I lost everything I was carrying. Im never playing this game again, unless you fix this crap

developer_response.body: Hey, welcome to the game! One important thing to know as a new player: in an extraction shooter, your loot is only saved if you successfully extract from the map. Leaving mid-raid means losing what you carried in. We know this can be a tough lesson early on but it's a core part of the genre. We've also made several AI balance adjustments in recent updates to help with the overall difficulty curve. Hope you'll give it another shot!

reviews.review_title: Wayyyyy better than ghosts of Tabor.
reviews.review_description:
Tons of depth, missions, items, gunsmithing. Very clean and full maps... as much as you can demand from standalone q3 at least imo. 

The game feels and plays very clean, and is pretty addicting. Best of all there's like zero pay to win, give me your monies crap all over! Just good gameplay, missions, getting in with friends is easy... it really kind of reminds me of an into the radius type... especially on pve mode.

reviews.review_title: Battle Royal, Please make a comeback 🙏
reviews.review_description:
Contractors Showdown is one of the most immersive and intense multiplayer experiences available in VR. When the game is firing on all cylinders, nothing else really compares to the feeling of dropping into a match with a coordinated squad, communicating in real time, and surviving large-scale firefights in VR.

The problem is not that ExfilZone exists — it’s that many players feel the original Battle Royale identity is being diluted instead of strengthened alongside it.

A lot of us bought into Showdown because it felt like the first VR shooter that truly captured the scale, tension, and social energy of modern multiplayer games. The BR mode created moments that felt impossible in other VR titles. That experience deserves long-term support and a healthy player population.

Separating BR and ExfilZone more clearly could benefit everyone:
- BR can become the accessible, high-population gateway experience.
- ExfilZone can continue evolving into the deeper hardcore mode for committed players.

If Battle Royale became free-to-play, with strong onboarding and stable matchmaking, it could massively increase player counts and give the game a healthier ecosystem overall. More players benefits the community and the developers long-term.

Most players are not asking the team to abandon innovation. We’re asking for clarity of direction and support for the mode that made many of us fall in love with the game in the first place.

This game has the foundation to become one of VR’s defining multiplayer titles if the community feels both modes are allowed to thrive instead of compete for survival.

Pretty alright game, loving the new wipe, except for one pretty major fact. The servers are quite laggy. Every gunfight result is at least a full second behind your actual gunfight happening. This will ruin your game and wipe and literally ruin the entire gameplay of extracting This game is in the worst state for trading kills that I've ever seen it. Half of my gunfights ending in both people somehow dying has ruined this wipe for me. In an extraction shooter this is a very large problem. Hopefully they can focus on fixing the servers next time, I know many content creators have been asking for that for awhile.

Update: the devs have responded boys... Some very generic "super sorry that out game doesn't function we are definitely looking into this thankssssss" well woweee we have fixed the 50% of servers having no latency so you trade kills, but low and behold the new issue is worse! Now 50% of games I load into will DISCONNECT in the middle of the game. My MILLION dollar kit, now in the developers abyss never to be seen again. Well exfilzone used to let you load into games that you got kicked out of...... NO-SIR-EEE BOBBY!! All of it gone. It really makes it hard to enjoy the grind, as the grind WILL be stolen from you. Please please listen to the community and focus on your servers. I wish I could give negative stars until they've worked on it.

New update 1: the devs have been responding still and to their credit the game does seem to be functioning better. I am having less (not zero, but less) trading kill fights with other players and I have not had another crash without reloading since the previous update. I'm glad to see the devs responding and actually seeming to work towards a full fix. I'm happy I can add more stars to my review. But not too many because they have switched this bug with a one that using your backpack will randomly throw items into oblivion. Bots will also one tap you in the head even though you have a full health level 5 helmet and facemask, while behind you btw. Still a 1 star game

reviews.review_title: Great game, but make BR relevant again
reviews.review_description: It’s a great game don’t get me wrong but I know there’s been updates here and there with their most recent update they added exfil PVE. That’s a great thing but what’s not so great is barely having a lobby in the battle royale version of the game. I remember playing this game when it was in beta and when it wasn’t hard to find a full lobby of 30 (60 for trio)  people that was the most fun I ever had on this game. I downloaded this game thinking that battle royale would still be somewhat popular but when I mange to get into a lobby i’m disappointed that there’s only one other squad. now I understand that people have preferences but I want the devs to care about battle royale again I wanna experience the cod warzone like gameplay but in VR

Both Showdown and ExfilZone modes are great. The battle royale used to be amazing but is suffering from lack of players now, it's still one of the best ones on VR but the queues are long and tedious.

ExfilZone on the other hand doesn't depend that much on the amount of players online (as less are required per match) and it's really enjoyable and rewarding. It's still an alpha, so some bugs are to be expected, but it runs surprisingly well and the mechanics are polished. Only caveat is that due to the nature of extraction shooters being a little unforgiving, new players can find themselves losing a lot before they get a hold of the game loop. So it can be a little discouraging at first. 

In both cases, movement and gunplay feels quick and snappy.

UPDATE: With the new PvE mode available, new players have a place to learn the ropes before joining full PvPvE lobbies. So there is no excuse now to give the game a try if you feel it will suit you!

BR needs its get back, this was quite clearly them trying to make BR like showdown, they removed half pf one of the best maps in the game, when you shoot a gun it’s all over the place, why in a BR game mode do you lost stamina like who had that idea, why can’t we go back to when season 1 came out and the game was skyrocketing, us BR players have been asking for it and we get this bs, it’s not hard to multitask and update BR and exfil, but when you finally update BR we get this, ever since exfil BR has never seen another update, and as BR was starting to heal just a little this comes into play, you can’t even get into a Mach bc everyone ghosted the game or it’s broken, regardless it’s just sad, I was a grate player at the game at least top 10 so I played the game a lot, until it became the only game I had but when this came I went back to pop 1, this is embarrassing for the whole contractors showdown community.

developer_response.body: BR is still something we’re committed to, and we’re working toward bringing it back as free to play with new content. We hear that the current state isn’t where it needs to be and we’ll keep that in mind as we move forward.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.review_description: my only issue with this game is the constant feeling of fear of using my best gear, because of fear of loosing it, so i feel like there is no need to get them since i’m never going to use them, as a PVE player I suggest that you have the opportunity to buy back the gear you lost from the raid but not the items you got in the raid, or just have a option to keep the inventory that you take into the raid or something idk.

exfil zone is cool im not here to say its bad..mission successful. I know you wanted to prove that tabor guy that u could make a better extraction shooter. Cool you did it. But can we get back to battle royal soon...like it's been years and years guys. Wipe after wipe after wipe. Battle royal never saw half the updates exfil did. We had season 0 and season 1 then everything good about battle royal was deleted and now runs even worse than ever..purposely sabotaging one game to make people play another is dirty af. Especially when you completely re write an app we all purchased for battle royal. You guys say don't worry and battle royal wasn't abandoned but come on....dupers duping every wipe....then it gets patched but dupers already have all they need for an entire wipe. On top of all theyre crap friends that do the same thing.Things getting added to exfil that no one asked for. While we've been begging battle royal to come back for literal years now....outlaw den, relics, cemetery, industrial, old new town....even old town for crying out loud. We don't want exfil maps in battle royal. Who the heck said we did? Who said we want 65 % of battle royal removed ? Who said that bro? Nobody I know was talking crazy like that? It's obvious you guys did it to force players over to exfil. Ok fine BUT NOW THAT YEARS HAVE PASSED CAN WE GET OUR GAME BACK?!?! Pve? Armor repair tool? Are you people freaking kidding me? CAVEMAN. I LOVE YOU GUYS. I REALLY DO....but please. I am begging you guys...on my hands and knees for the love of all thing holy PLEEEEASE BRING BATTLE ROYAL BACK

The graphics, QoL, the maps, and a dev team openly taking suggestions and implementing said suggestions quickly. This game has alot going for it. With the new PvE mode I finally took a dive in to learn this game and man am I glad I did! As a 1400 hour Tarkov veteran, this is as close as it gets in VR. Very polished game. 9.8/10 so far

This is the worst season I've been playing this year. Most of the game mechanics are glitching: items I've collected or bought disappear from the base, even entire backpacks of resources disappear from shelves, and money disappears. You can even get kicked out of a raid, or the game simply crashes on any map anywhere—this can happen (I'm playing Quest 3, and there are no out-of-memory errors). There are players duping ammo, there are cheaters who see where you are and one-shot you. Hit registration is terrible: you see a head sticking out, you shoot, and you see that you hit and dealt damage, but no, there's no damage, or it's actually hit a different part of the body. There are also super rare items and keys needed for leveling and quests, and all progress is halted because these items simply don't spawn, and after tens or hundreds of hours of grinding, you might never find them.  One star only for adding a PvE mode where there are no cheaters and terrible hit registration and you can play in peace.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed report. We take this seriously and have been actively shipping fixes, including patches for duplication exploits, backend server stability improvements. On cheating, this is an ongoing fight and BattlEye is part of our longer-term approach to keeping it in check. We know there’s more to do and we appreciate you laying it all out.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.review_description: I am playing the second wipe. Even with game issues it’s still deep in my heart. I am spending 4 hours daily In the game but one issue from this wipe is really frustrating. You can not do anything outside the game. I mean when I am playing with friends and they call me on meta when I hide game to answear the call screen game is freezing and you can to nothing. Only restarting the game. Same thing happends when I go outside boundary scale and go back it happends also. My friends also have this issue. Please fix it

Probably the most fun and addictive VR game I’ve played. I own the PC and Quest version and honestly they are exactly the same but a very very slight blur on the Quest version. Only problem is the Quest version keeps crashing in raids and I keep loosing expensive gear I’ve purchased with real money in DLCs. I can understand stability issues with a new game like this but if it happens in a raid you lose everything. 
*** Update, this game has stolen so much stuff from me now. Just moving around in my hideout and my guy will glitch out and whatever I’m holding just disappeared forever, to include entire collection boxes full of items acquired over many many raids.

PvE (especially with co-op) is the only reason why I wanted to play this game and what I had wished for a long time, because waiting 5+ minutes in a VR headset for a PvP match is a total nightmare. For the rest, it's one of the most thought-out games in VR. The gunplay and gunsmith mechanics are on par with Into The Radius, which is literally the peak of VR games. Only one problem, AI enemies are static when hit by bullets, acting like damage-absorbing sponges - given the TTK, it looks pretty absurd.
UPDATE: There's not only one problem here. First, what's the problem with making some kind of loot list where you can mark the things you need to get from a raid? Such a basic feature. Why do I have to remember all the things I need for the HQ upgrade? The second thing - either make more precise collision boxes for loot items or increase the raid time. I spend a quarter of the time arranging items in the backpack, and it's a nightmare. Some of the collision boxes are so weird that it turns into a very annoying activity. The third thing - there is no touch feeling in VR, so what's the problem with highlighting an item in the backpack that you're about to grab? It's not about causality or hardcore gameplay, it's about basic quality of life that any game with loot micro-management must have until VR can emulate touch perception. Right now it's just another annoying thing when you grab something you didn't mean to. Two years since release - still no basic QoL features.
UPDATE 2: Ahh, so you blindly copied after tarkov all the things entirely. This "game" has super slow progression with boring grind and static bullet sponge bots. But the "best part" is a bunch of severe bugs. I wrote  something about QoL above but this game needs to be fixed first.

developer_response.body: Thank you. These are all great suggestions and we’ll pass them along to the team. On a lighter note, we just rolled out a new in-game event this past Saturday, “Merchant Commissions,” with extra rewards including task-skip tokens, might be worth checking out for some added new variety while we keep working on the rest.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: Just got a notification right after loading into a raid and the game freaked out and crashed. I literally just spent like the last 25 mins getting everything together and figuring out the upgrade stuff since you can't actually see the hole the fuel goes in only for the game to crash for like the 50th time today over a f++king notification. How on Earth is your QC that bad that you guys didn't even check that? Thanks for making a game where you constantly lose your load outs due to bull++it and glitches. I lost a gun in the loading screen because I let go of the trigger to check my phone. What type of ret++ded bulls++t is that?
There are no new VR shooters for years and so I tried this and it was definitely the worst $15 I ever spent. Not eligible for refunds either because glitched bulls++t counts as play time. Of course lmao.

Game was fun when it was just battle royale. Mediocre updates and an exfil mode destroyed the br aspect of this game, dooming it to mediocrity. If you ONLY want to play exfilzone, go for it, but the battle royale part is dead

I was in my hideout trying to do upgrades and randomly I'm loading back in the hideout and the junk container is gone deleted. It's not in storage just gone. I have lost three containers now full of junk and im tired of wasting money to buy a large container and finding all that stuff again. Or my shelf will randomly be empty and sent to storage. I couldn't play for a day because every time I loaded in to a match my arms are behind my body so all I can do is just run around and die. Another thing that happens is the map just stops rendering and I go from sneaking around to hopping up and down nonstop making a bunch of noise and I can't run so I die. At this point im done

I would love the restock feature if it worked! Everytime something good comes up i buy it  then it doesn't show up....average stuff works but good stuff NOPE! Of course it takes the money but NOTHING drops fix this please and I will give this 5 stars it will deserve

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and sorry about the frustration. This is something we’ve been actively working on and have shipped fixes for purchased items failing to spawn in recent updates. If you’re still experiencing this after updating, please reach out to our support team on Discord and we’ll look into it for you. Hope to earn that 5 stars soon!​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.review_title: If I could give a lower star I would(ed)
reviews.review_description:
Just did a scav raid and thanks to their recent update I kept lagging throughout dam then I got jumped which is fine. Ran had the angle and a impact grenade pulled it dude came around the corner shooting a ELIITTEEEE SCAAAVVVVVV AS I PROCEEDED TO THROW THE GRENADE  it didn't go off until after I died from being shot by this dude. ruined my whole week with the bull good luck to you all because if this is what expected hell nawwwe👌

(Edit) Thanks to developer support team responding back I am greatful for you guys trying to fix these issues. I initially gave a 1 star as this is a major problem and is beyond frustrating especially when doing task that are not easy to complete, but I understand the game is actively getting better day by day so I bump my review up to 3 for the quick response and sincere apology. Again I am greatful for the response, please keep up the good work.

reviews.review_title: Was kicked because of a glitch
reviews.review_description: First off I wanna say that the game is really one of the best games I’ve ever played on VR and every where else. I was banned or kicked for a glitch in the game by two of the biggest hackers in the game: Paramagician and Capaho are hackers that exploit this game so bad on every level they got plate hacks headshot and speed hacks I can go on with other stuff too! Outside of looking into other things that’s wrong with this game just keep an eye on them. There’s definitely more hackers on here but we’ll get to them later please clean this mess up along with these glitches in this game thank you! 🙏🏾

reviews.review_title: New ExfilZone’s PvE Mode and wipe
reviews.review_description:
ExfilZone finally feels like it’s hitting its stride. With the latest wipe and the introduction of PvE mode, the experience has transformed from something niche into something far more complete—and, more importantly, consistently enjoyable.

The wipe itself does exactly what a good wipe should: reset the playing field without making progress feel meaningless. Early-game pacing is tighter, loot feels more purposeful, and progression no longer drags in that awkward middle zone where you’re grinding without direction. There’s a renewed sense of momentum, and it makes jumping back in actually exciting rather than a chore.

But the real game-changer is PvE. This isn’t just a side mode—it fundamentally improves how ExfilZone can be played. Whether you want to practice routes, experiment with loadouts, or just avoid the constant pressure of PvP, PvE offers a flexible alternative without sacrificing tension. AI encounters are engaging enough to keep you alert, and the structure gives each run a clear sense of purpose.

What’s impressive is how PvE complements, rather than replaces, the core experience. It lowers the barrier for entry while still giving experienced players a space to refine their skills. That balance is something a lot of extraction-style games struggle with, and ExfilZone handles it surprisingly well here.

Combined with the wipe, PvE makes the entire game feel more accessible, more replayable, and simply more fun. It’s no longer just about high-stakes PvP runs—it’s about having options. And right now, ExfilZone is offering some of the best variety and pacing the genre has seen in a while.

If this direction continues, ExfilZone isn’t just improving—it’s setting a new standard for what players should expect from this kind of game.

What the hell I had really good gear on and I lost it because of one massive glitch where I fell through the map and had to shoot myself and lost all my gear and also I keep losing stuff by it dropping through the floor the developers if you’re reading this please fix this

Great game, rated four stars only for the misinformation given in the store. You cannot actually play thus without an internet connection. Even the pve mode is online, even when running solo. If you made an option to actually play offline, it would be much better, or change the no internet needed info in the store. Great game, excited to see where EZ leads. W battle royale mode, but the lobbies are dead now, taking around five mins to find a game with seven people total

This would be 5 stars all day long if you could play without human players, please please please throw in a pve ONLY MODE. I can't describe the infuriation of making it 10 steps from extraction with low health, several missions in the bag, feeling so happy and getting popped by a 10 yo camping the exfil. That makes me not want to come back ever again. If I wanted that kind of experience id play tarkov or ark raiders. I'm having the time of my life otherwise and cant get enough, keep it coming guys!

Its basically VR Tarkov, if you play Tabor does the following things better by a substantial amount in Contractors. 

Guns - more, sound better, look better, feel better. 

AI - WAY better, use tactics, actually give audio que when they are alerted, AI scavs and PMC’s allow for more dynamic feeling environment as there is more gun fights scattered through map. 

Maps - More dense, more buildings, more NPC’s more patrols, harder areas of map

Missions - Probably the biggest slap to Tabor, Missions feel more engaging, better thought out, specific objectives, mission based items to bring back. This was a refreshing change from Tabor constantly asking for kills or random loot. 

Level system - It takes time to level up which is nice, probably 10 hours played before i hit level 14…… i was getting 6 plus levels per raid in Tabor getting to level 24 in 2-3 game sessions easily less than 40 raids. Levelling￼ up feels rewarding in this game. 

Overall - Contractors does literally every single thing better than Tabor expect one thing. Draw distance, enemy character models will disappear in contractors around 100 meters where Tabor actually feels like its closer to 300-400 meters. This is small, but becomes distracting my biggest issue with Contractors is having enemy AI randomly pop into view and they instantly see me if they sre facing my direction. It makes snipers feel useless because a holo site is effective at 100 meters in this game. 

I did not mean for this reveiw to sound like me ripping on Tabor, i do however feel most people interested in this are from Tabor or heard of /played Tabor first. This is why my main focus points were a comparison as there is basically Tabor and Contractors. If you want a third option Vail is there but i feel while its similar it is too far different from Contractors and Tabor. 

Please if any Contractor Dev sees this PLEASE consider increasing draw distance.

Hi, when I first played your pve mode I got really really excited first match in I saw boss areas and was like oh cool, but my first NPC a normal guy nothing special I dumped 20 rounds into his chest and he didn’t go down I dumped another 20 rounds he still didn’t go down. I died. So I tried again same thing so all the raids I’ve been playing I been doing headshots only yes, I tried ap rounds on the NPCS they still didn’t go down to body shots! I love your guys game and the fun system and all and I hope you understand how frustrating it, tho this is still not stopping me from playing

I bought this game for one reason and one reason only it was for the battle royal now all my friends are playing exvil zone and I’m the only one actually playing tabor now, the fact is it seems like I can’t play battle royal anymore because no one plays it I just want to have a good time and no one plays the battle royal I miss when I could find a game in 20 secs or less now it takes over 10 minutes just to not find any games this is one of the worst additions any game dev has ever added.

reviews.review_title: They need to fix exfil issues.
reviews.review_description: I understand that this game is in alpha so I expect things to go south every now and then, but when Im playing solo and I can't exfil at all so I have to disconnect from the server and lose everything I just worked for it makes the game almost unplayable. Or when I'm in multiplayer and my teammate starts moonwalking so I know either me or him just bugged out. And it's consistent too. I'm lost for words at this point. Love the concept of this game but its got a long way to go...

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words on the concept and for being understanding. The server issue has been something we’ve been actively working on and have shipped fixes. We know there’s still work to do and we appreciate your patience while we get there.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ Apologies for the negative experience.

reviews.review_description:
This game is absolutley amazing the mechanics are great the graphics are amazing for having such a big map and I live how you can find attachments, yes it made me motion sick when I got it,  but after a day or two of playing, the motion sickness goes away. The three things I wish this game had though would be duos mode, a 2x scope, and a burst ar. You should for sure but this game because it is amazing and amazingly priced.

#bringbattleroyaleback

reviews.review_title: Bring back the days without exfilzone
reviews.review_description: When I bought the game in 2024 before exfilzone it was great in everyway servers was full to the max trios was working then when they added exfilzone everything changed I only get 6-12 people in reborn and it takes over 20 mins to get me into a trios game idk why they stopped updating it I also don’t see a point in exfilzone should’ve just left it to tabor just bring back the old days and take exfilzone out so everyone goes back to battle royale

First off I think this game is an awesome one there are developers that actually do listen to the community. There is just one problem though. I see a lot of people complaining about how they abandoned battle Royal and I think its justified when these people first bought the game I would guess its for the battle royal. But then exfilzone came out and then they just stopped updating it all I ask of the dev team is to put more work into battle Royal Divide the work into 2.

Such a fun game, more than tabor but since its still very work in progress it has its flaws. Bugs, exploits, have been still a issue at times. Also wish maps were smaller or had more cover!!! other than that its nice, and trying to be tarkov but vr lol.

So far, ive enjoyed the game. However, after completing two raids, I tried to do a third one about 4 to 5 hours later and once I got in the map, found a few things and killed an enemy, the game crashed, kicked me out and I was back in my bunker empty handed. I tried to go into another raid and when I got in the map and found a few things, it crashed again, kicked me out and put me back in empty handed again. I lost a lot of ammunition, guns, medical supplies, food, water. Pretty much everything you take with you on a raid. 

The game even caused my headset to turn of a few time which i have never experienced with any other game before and its never ever done that. I'm disappointed and dont know what to do since I had high hopes for this game. I'm not saying the game is horrible... I'm just saying I lost a lot of things and ive only started playing this game so I'm a beginner and I need everything I can get.

 I hope there will be a solution to this because I'm down bad now. And also, in pve mode, it takes quiet a few hits to kill an enemy which requires you to bring alot of ammo when your out on raids which to me, is pretty inconvenient. My backpack would be full up of more ammo than anything else. Maybe decreasing the amount of hits an enemy takes would be extremely ideal and helpful.

reviews.review_title: The best vr game to date!!
reviews.review_description: With the new addition of pve this is now my most favourite game ever made. It's utterly fantastic. Sure there's a few bugs but the devs are brilliant with multiple updates already since new wipe so I'm sure they'll iron them out in time. Pve is difficult at the minute even on casual but so much fun to play without having to worry about running into kitted teams! An amazing start to pve. Ghosts of Tabor now has nothing on this game there's just no comparison. I only played tabor for the pve but this blows it out the water. I don't see myself revisiting tabor any day in the the distant future. You people at caveman are awesome keep up the great work!

reviews.review_title: Best weapons, BR and extraction in vr.
reviews.review_description: Also I'd like to thank the developers for making a hardcore game, i love how detailed and full features exfill is, i thought that kind of games were only for pc but this game is really fun and addicting. BR is just for the people who want to grab a gun and shoot and there are too many games like that. Exfil is a MUST if you like hardcore games and you look for the "hard" difficulty when you enter a game.

This game has had its ups and downs with getting hacked and tons of exploits/cheats, a lot of which can be game breaking, especially towards the economy, but I’ll give you 5 minutes to think of a game that doesn’t have people trying to exploit and cheat, flat screen or VR. I would highly recommend this over Tabor any day. Don’t get me wrong, Ghosts of Tabor is great, and I played it since the second wipe, but I lost interest in it when they started adding a bunch of DLC stuff instead of trying to fix bugs that were in the game since day 1. Not to mention, Scott is kind of a manchild. Not saying that Caveman is the best studio ever, because honestly they aren’t, but my point is I’d recommend this game over Tabor any day of the week.

reviews.review_title: Good but might refund if keeps continue
reviews.review_description: Contractors showdown is a good game, really is but I have issues when doing raids. When playing pve everytime I go to passthrough or menu my game crashes and I load back in just to lose all my stuff and kit and I get really frustrated. Please fix this.

I really do miss the battle Royal mode. I was just a super fun and adrenaline driven game mode! If we could bring it back or something that would be awesome I miss that mode! Love the game in total tho thank you!!!

Genuinely don't know how tabors dogsh game was considered the best, back then it was since it was like the only vr fps extraction. Exfilzone is def gonna be the best for a while as long as they don't get lazy and sloppy like tabor

Awesome. Thats all i can say. I am really fond of the extraction mode (Exfil Zone). The details and quality of objects and weapon mechanics are really astonishing for a quest game. But i have some Ideas for improvement. The gun sounds sound a little bit cheap and unrealistic. They could be louder and could have a bit more of a "pop" to them. The map graphics look a little bit off sometimes same goes for the weather and ambience. For a game with this quality i kinda miss sunlight and more realistic weather. And one of the things i would really love, is a standard integrated Zombie Mode for Exfil Zone and drivable vehicles like in the battle royale mode. The survival mechanics and the feeling of an open world where you can loot every single cabinet and collect most basic Items feels absolutely awesome and really realistic. It is kind of a shame that there is no good zombie survival game that features the amazing mechanics and details of contractors showdown. This concept filled with Zombies AND AI scavengers (survivors) would make this game my absolute favourite game in my quest library without exception. And adding Vehicles to Exfil Zone would definitely make this whole thing complete. Zombie Mode in Exfil Zone, and vehicles in Exfil Zone. Can’t say it enough. I feel like this would skyrocket sales by thousands if that was added. But besides that, amazing game. I can recommend it.

Prob one of the best extraction shooters ever, even better then flat screen games with amazing movement. People say that tabor is better but I say they are quite even. Tabor is much more realistic and actually makes you nervous but exfilzone is more casual. One of the best things about it is the bunker and the movement. Movement in exfilzone feels natural and smooth unlike tabor but compromises either worse maps and scavs. The bunker looks great and so do the maps even in standalone plus when you start out it is very beginner friendly giving you everything you need for dozens of raids unlike tabor. But by far the best part are the sounds in the game, whether you rack a gun or put armor on it sounds like the most satisfying tactical asmr. My favorite noise is putting a grenade in a holder. Another great thing is the ammo, the ou get to bring clumps Alf ammo and load them by hand and it genuinely feels like your putting real bullets in the mag. Overall it is a well polished calmer version of tabor that you can hop on with friends and have a blast. When with a friend the movements look really realistic and it feels like you are actually with them.

reviews.review_title: Please add mods to PvE exfil
reviews.review_description: Add mods and more maps, please don’t add mods to PvP just PVE that would be awesome and real fun and addicting your game would probably be the most popular game on the store so please add mods and new maps￼

DO NOT BOTHER buying the Halloween dlc. They used to let you buy the armor in the store after you purchased the dlc. But now they just take the money and you get one armor set and have to earn the roght to buy it again. Yall robbed me, would love a refund, or honestly just let us get the armor we paid for

If you’re seriously saying this game looks better than Tabor, I don’t know what you’re looking at the graphics really aren’t that impressive. It’s not the worst game ever, but calling it “better” is a stretch.
The bigger problem is performance. I ran into more bugs and crashes in my first hour than I have with Tabor good thing all of them were before I loaded into a game and it feels way less stable overall. It stutters constantly too, and I’d honestly take lower FPS any day over a game that keeps freezing and hitching like this.
For context, I’m playing on a Meta Quest 3S with everything else closed.

Edit: just had my first crash in game and this is taking a star off because how are you not going to have a rejoin feature how are you guys going to say to this game  is better when there's no rejoin feature for crashes

reviews.review_title: I deserve a refund! Devs are scammers.
reviews.review_description:
I bought this game for battle Royale when it came out, the game was advertised as a battle Royale now it's a completely different game that I do not want to own!
 Loved this game before they changed the entire game. it's absolutely ridiculous and seems like a form of fraud.

Yall need to fix the damage output and the damage taken from enemy ai it takes 3-4 headshot and literally 2 whole mags to kill em for a body shot but then they hit me for 3 bullets and i lose 99% of my health this game is dogwater bs
THIS IS THE WORST OPTIMISED GAME I'VE EVER PLAYED. Constant crashes, task items not working, no way to restart tasks.. This game makes me want to play tabor, that is not a good thing

developer_response.body: Sorry about the crashes and task issues. We’ve shipped backend server improvements recently to help with stability, and previous updates have also addressed several inaccurate task descriptions and task-related bugs. If specific tasks are still stuck for you, please reach out to our support team on Discord and we’ll help look into it.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.review_description: I loved this game from the start, with its realistic weapon functions to its gear scaling. But there is only one issue ive seen so far that is honestly ruining the game. De-Sync, essentially when you can just stand there with your hands empty and you notice the frames drop just for a second, but in that second, there is no floor barrier for items, so they just fall through the map. Anything you might have in your hand is released and might fall through as well. I have even stood there looking at someone at a distance in game and ALL my gear disappeared on my character. All relative high tier gear, that I spent 20+ hours gathering all lost for 1 second of lost floor barriers. And its not even uncommon either, I just ran my last game and counted 13 times in 15 minutes my character either dropped something in hand,  off person, or items I never even touched. So unfortunately regardless of how much I actually ended up loving this game, Im calling it with this one. I hope others have a better experience with this game.

Ok so ive spent more time searching the internet for a fix for a bug im getting. Character will not drink anything at all. Im stuck at 0 water añd my character just dies. Got plenty of water but the character will not drink even though the sound and animation work.
Honestly the game was really fun until this and now it looks as if ive got to wait a few months for the wipe or something. I wish i could get a refund but this hilarious bug happened just over 2 hours in. 
Update, I deleted the app data for the game in the quest and ran the tutorial/setup again and now the drinking bug has gone.
Honestly this game is so much fun.
Now i wanna buy some dlc but on meta i can only gift it! 
I think the bug i had was probably a meta problem as this headset software is total garbage.

I love this game so much and I’ve played tabor many times too but let’s be honest tabor is dead and exfeilzone has taken over great game fun with friends highly recommend but we do need pegboard mobility where we can face our filings up like tabor
So before the game was arlight now  the games is FUN the new map is amazing and over all ten out of ten great game u should buy it if looking for action  shooter game

First of all the battle royale mode is HORRIBLE I don’t remember it being this buggy and it really needs way more work to it to at least make it playable. However the exfilzone is actually really good especially since you can play against ai instead of a bunch of random sweats and the ai is relatively smart and it’s an easy gamemode to get into. So if I had to ask for any changes: make the battle royale playable again and possibly even add pve in that also. Besides that its a really fun game

Ah yes, VR Battle Royale it's a perfect concept. Population 1 did it so why can't the  creators of contractors do it... In the beginning stages they did it perfectly nice guns, Nice map, Good gimmicks. No pay to win. We the OG players have no news for the Battle Royale mode, it's only exfil, exfil, exfil nothing about the original Battle Royale that I knew. No updates, no players, No fun. Exfil could have been a different game, but no let's completely overshadow the best Battle Royale... Suspending updates for Battle Royale and focusing solely on exfil. What about the OG's the ones who bought the Battle Royal game not the extraction shooter.

developer_response.body: We hear you. BR hasn’t been abandoned — it’s still being worked on, and we’ll share more as soon as there’s news we can announce.

reviews.review_description:
I realy love the game. Since i bought it i can barely put it down when i get some freetime. I bought the game on meta store so i can play it standalone after just moving, and my pc not being the priority. Now that i have gotten my PC, wanted to play PCVR for the graphics. But I'm sad to see that saves dont carry over, even both "platforms" relying on metastore.
My biggest request would be to make cross-save possible, even on standalone-PCVR. It would elevate playability in the future.
Other than that? Gunplay is solid, AI is solid, maps are great. No real negative from my pov.
Go go Caveman go, keep it up!

In my experience (I played during the playtest stage) this is an amazing game for the price. There are some moments in this game where it is buggy but they typically get patched quickly. The game runs great on quest 2 and still looks good. I did read a few of the 1 star reviews and I noticed a lot of them were about BR being neglected, genuine skill issues, or actual bugs. This is a little off topic but this game has very few DLCS and the DLCS aren't extremely overpowered, and they're at a good price. In my experience this is an amazing game and the devs genuinely care about this game and I look forward to the future of this game.

Randomly crashes mid raid. If you are solo it's considered death so you lose all your gear and guns. Nothing to remedy it on the players end. Major game killing issue. Good overall game would consider changing rating if this is fixed.

reviews.review_title: PVE is a great addition to the game
reviews.review_description:
I've been in this game from the very start, every mode was great, I do miss some of the old modes, but now PVE mode has come... the game is great! You are going to get an easy 150+ hours of campaign time in this game, and then you can still just play for fun doing key runs, building up your wealth. I have probably spent a solid half a year of my life in this game since it came out,
PVP has way to many cheaters, but PVE has saved the game for those who just want to play at their own pace.
Buy a DLC and support these guys, you are getting so much content for your money.

This is a great game and the “though” in the title isn’t negativity towards the game itself though I don’t like how much hate the extraction mode is getting, sure BR was og but when exfil zone came out I really enjoyed it and still do now and I understand people think they the devs “abandoned “ br to reassure everyone they haven’t abandoned it they are just focused on exfil zone so I ask everyone to please not give it hate just because it the devs and game mode don’t deserve it if you liked br maybe play population 1 or something. Over all this is a great game and exfil doesn’t deserve the hate it has now. And to be clear this is more of a message to the community rather than the devs. Sincerely, Sloth542689

This game is great better than ghost of tabor I think but this wipe is extremely glichie compared to all other wipes the players can now glitch through walls I have run into one particular guy several times who does it on metro very frustrating one other frustrating thing is the scavs guys calm it down in them you cant even get a min in the game before scavs are all over you in metro I just got out of a game where I was going to engage on this team but got crapped on by what seemed to be almost every bot on that level floor with boss as well shooting thru wall windows all that crap they don’t need to be that hard calm it down dude. That being said I love this game and hope you guys actually care what people say and fix these problems.

reviews.review_title: Used to be a good game
reviews.review_description: I can’t with this game, been so hyped up to buy and play this game, bought the dlcs, and now I want my money back, first, the Ganymede container sucks, the spots always glitch and same with the mars, ran full kits and only to get killed the elite firing squad, this game has been testing my limits from randomly turning my screen black, and getting flinged when I hop over a staircase, game used to be peak, now it’s this. Honestly disappointing cause I saved my allowance for this.

reviews.review_title: I meant to put two stars
reviews.review_description: It's just not fun. Except for battle royale it's pretty fun just completely delete exfilzone and just call it contractors br then i will rate it five stars.

Gameplay felt smooth on quest 3s and even quest 2. PVE is fun, they did some more balancing, the devs are so attentive and kind, and I'm glad i got this game twice and three dlcs total, worth every cent, so much fun, but make it so there are fewer valuables, and maybe bring back the previous wipes graphics and models because we are backtracking there. 8.5 or 9/10 game, and no, I wouldnt round down the star.
